subcodes.first_line: Verily they who have journeyed and migrated unto God, theirs shall be a mighty reward. Blessed be the people of Nún who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الذین سافروا و هاجروا الی الله اولئک لهم اجر عظیم طوبی لاهل النون الذین
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @knowledge; recognition of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
